put.summary: Inject a sensor reading (simulated HAL only)
put.description: Creates or replaces the injection on this sensor metric (controller HAL §9). The simulated HAL returns the forced value until the injection is cleared or its TTL expires. For metric=temperature, omit `probe_index` to force all redundant probes (driving the fused median — e.g. to trip the critical-temperature interlock) or set it to force one probe (driving outlier detection); for metric=soil_moisture, `zone_id` selects the zone. A value outside the metric's plausibility bound, a `probe_index` on a non-temperature metric, or a missing `zone_id` on soil_moisture is rejected with 422. Simulated backend only — a real-hardware backend returns 404. An injection cannot suppress a safety interlock; it can trigger one.

200.description: The active injection after applying the request.

delete.summary: Clear a sensor-reading injection (simulated HAL only)
delete.description: Removes the injection on this metric and returns the channel to its simulated reading (controller HAL §9). For metric=temperature this clears all forced probes; for metric=soil_moisture, pass `zone_id` to select the zone. Simulated backend only — a real-hardware backend returns 404.
